title: Pinch to zoom
drDigitalIntro: What if you'd like to zoom in on pictures or text? Spread two fingers apart on the trackpad to make something bigger, or move two fingers closer together to make it smaller. Each animal below is hiding a tiny number — zoom in close to find it!

playgroundTask.instructions: Pinch to zoom in on each animal (or hold Ctrl and scroll) to find its hidden number, then type all four numbers in order.

drDigitalSuccess: You zoomed right in and cracked the code! Pinch to zoom is yours now.
drDigitalHint: Put two fingers on the trackpad and spread them apart over an animal to zoom in — or hold Ctrl and scroll if you're using a mouse. Look closely for a tiny number, then type all four in order.
